name: T1Mundial_First_6_Motion_Test_v001
purpose: Manual node-by-node blueprint for first 6 image-to-video motion tests. Official docs confirm media import nodes and shared workflow duplication, but no public JSON workflow import format was found.

global.style_text_node: Cinematic Mexican commerce and football parallel world, grounded realism, authorial film language, soft analog highlight rolloff, fine grain, lifted blacks, textured skin, fabric, metal, concrete, grass, dust and haze, natural light first, practical light second, restrained warm-gold and cool-shadow palette, red accent #DA3B2B only where present in the reference, emotional but not patriotic, never stock advertising.
global.motion_text_node: Animate from the provided still reference as a strict keyframe anchor. Preserve the original composition, lens language, character identity, wardrobe, environment, lighting and color. Use cinematic camera movement: controlled push-in, dolly, short pan, rack focus, shallow depth of field, natural motion blur, and purposeful atmospheric movement. Keep the shot elegant, grounded and realistic. Do not invent story elements.
global.negative_text_node: no text, no captions, no subtitles, no labels, no titles, no watermarks, no logos, no brands, no trademarks, no sports brands, no official uniforms, no real football kits, no national team, no FIFA, no World Cup, no Mexico 2026, no real team symbols, no stadium names, no recognizable stadium architecture, no branded ball, no branded boots, no real athlete likeness, no celebrity likeness, no payment brands, no readable screen, no generated UI, no app icons, no UI labels, no UI numbers, no QR codes, no flag overlay, no national emblem, no eagle, no political map borders, no city labels, no map pins, no stock look, no HDR overprocessing, no plastic skin, no waxy faces, no distorted anatomy, no extra fingers, no malformed hands, no broken wrists, no artifacts, no chaotic morphing, no fake blur, no excessive lens flares, no heavy grime, no abandonment, no neglect, no destroyed walls.

recommended_model_order_inside_weave.reason: Best first guess for reference-driven motion inside Weave.
Higher-end image-to-video fallback if Seedance loses consistency.

recommended_model_order_inside_weave.model: Runway Gen-4 Turbo or Kling 2.5 First & Last Frame
recommended_model_order_inside_weave.reason: Alternative inside Weave if camera motion or identity retention fails.

node_pattern_per_shot: Text Node or direct field: global negative prompt
Video Model Node: image/reference + prompt + negative

shots.prompt:
Use the input image as the strict visual anchor.

SHOT:
Shot 01, small Mexican storefront opening at dawn, frontal symmetrical composition. A centered person in partial silhouette lifts a metal rolling shutter with both hands. Golden light rises from below and the metal texture is the hero.

CAMERA:
Low frontal camera. Slow cinematic push-in, almost imperceptible, with slight handheld presence.

ACTION:
The shutter rises subtly, warm dawn light breathes through the lower gap, tiny dust particles move in the air. Keep the scene quiet and suspended.

CONTINUITY:
Preserve the centered symmetry, low angle, golden light from below, metal texture and stillness from the reference.

Use the input image as the strict visual anchor.

SHOT:
Shot 02, fictional football player walking through a stadium tunnel. Low camera close to the floor, centered silhouettes, only legs, shin guards and partial bodies visible. Strong backlight at the end of the tunnel.

CAMERA:
Low dolly forward near the ground, matching the upward light energy from shot 01. Shallow depth of field.

ACTION:
Subtle walking motion, fabric movement, tunnel haze and breathing light. The player advances toward the stadium without revealing logos or official identity.

CONTINUITY:
Preserve the fictional green jersey with one white shoulder line, white shorts, red socks #DA3B2B, no logos, same tunnel composition and backlight.

Use the input image as the strict visual anchor.

SHOT:
Shot 03, young person seen from behind ascending stairs toward the surface at dusk. Red backpack #DA3B2B is the main color accent. All clothing is black. Symmetrical stair lines guide the eye upward.

CAMERA:
Rear centered tracking shot, slow upward dolly following the character's ascent.

ACTION:
The character climbs steadily. The red backpack sways subtly. Warm low side light and deep blue-orange dusk atmosphere remain stable.

CONTINUITY:
Preserve the rear view, centered composition, black outfit, red backpack, stair symmetry and crepuscular lighting.

Use the input image as the strict visual anchor.

SHOT:
Shot 04, fictional football player ascending a tunnel toward the field. Low rear angle, focus on legs and unbranded boots. Concrete stairs create forward lines. Stadium crowd opens in the background, softly blurred.

CAMERA:
Low rear dolly upward, close to the steps and boots, with gentle rack focus toward the stadium light.

ACTION:
The player climbs toward the field. Boots contact concrete naturally. Stadium light blooms softly ahead, with no logos or official identity.

CONTINUITY:
Preserve the low rear composition, concrete stair geometry, one white shoulder line, red socks #DA3B2B and fictional uniform.

Use the input image as the strict visual anchor.

SHOT:
Shot 05, the same young person now standing on a wide central CDMX sidewalk after emerging from the metro. Frontal medium shot or slight low angle. Face sharp and centered, looking forward with determination and hope. Black clothing, red backpack #DA3B2B as the only color accent.

CAMERA:
Very slow frontal push-in from chest height or slightly lower, with shallow depth of field.

ACTION:
The character holds still, breathing naturally. The city background stays open, quiet and anonymous, with dusk light framing the face.

CONTINUITY:
Preserve the same young person from shot 03, same black outfit, red backpack, centered frontal posture, open street feeling and warm low dusk light.

Use the input image as the strict visual anchor.

SHOT:
Shot 06, the same young person in a frontal centered composition, but the background has transformed completely into the interior of a full fictional stadium. Slight low angle, face looking upward with awe and determination. Stands rise behind the character with thousands of softly blurred spectators.

CAMERA:
Slow frontal push-in with a very subtle upward tilt, letting the stadium expand visually behind the character.

ACTION:
The character looks upward and breathes, with controlled emotion. Stadium lights and crowd atmosphere move subtly in the background, but the face remains stable and centered.

CONTINUITY:
Preserve the same young person from shots 03 and 05, same posture, same soft face light, same centered composition, no recognizable stadium architecture.
